label: Transparent maple samara motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Maple Seed transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a maple samara motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A temperate forest maple seed pair with twin amber papery wings, fine grey vein lines, reddish stem joint, small brown seed bodies, and a light dried botanical texture. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, unmistakably maple samara helicopter seed.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include the paired wing shape, seed bodies, red stem, and vein detail without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no maple leaf as main subject, no dragonfly wings, no feather, no acorn, no props, no hand, no landscape, no text, no watermark, no second plant species.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Maple Seed light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Maple Seed", derived from the visible maple samara cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible light navigation UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Maple Seed, Maple Samara, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from amber papery wings, fine grey veins, red stem joints, brown seed bodies, forest leaf hints, and dry parchment surfaces. The board must read as maple samara, not maple leaf, dragonfly, or feather.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, wing-parchment surfaces, amber-wing primary actions, red-stem accents, vein-grey borders, forest-leaf success, seed-brown depth, samara wing-vein texture.
Constraints: no maple leaf identity, no dragonfly wing identity, no feather imagery, no acorn, no generic orange-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Maple Seed", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Maple Seed dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Maple Seed". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the maple samara cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Maple Seed, Maple Samara, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve maple samara system language: amber-wing active states, red-stem accents, grey vein lines, seed-brown borders, parchment text, forest-leaf controls, papery wing texture, 8px radius, precise shadcn/tweakcn component grid. Must read as maple seed, not maple leaf or feather.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: deep forest ink and seed-brown dark surfaces, wing-parchment foreground, amber-wing active states, red-stem chart highlights, vein-grey separators, forest leaf focus/control accents, subtle papery vein overlays, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no maple leaf identity, no dragonfly wing identity, no feather imagery, no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Maple Seed".
